name: Whey protein isolate
summary: Decision-ready summary: Whey protein isolate is best framed for protein intake support; muscle protein synthesis; lean mass support; safety screen: milk allergy; severe kidney disease requiring protein restriction.
description: Whey protein isolate supports muscle and recovery biology via high-quality amino acid delivery and rapid stimulation of postprandial protein synthesis signaling.
safetyNotes: Avoid with milk allergy; protein targets should be individualized in severe kidney disease.
contraindications: Cow's-milk protein allergy because whey isolate remains a milk-protein ingredient.
